escalation.rationale: Belarus-Russia joint nuclear drills and Trump calling off Iran attack amid ongoing tensions elevate risk.

ticker_items: Belarus-Russia launch joint nuclear weapons training drills
Trump calls off planned Iran attack at Gulf states' request
Iran reactivates missile bunkers amid regional tensions
Lebanon death toll tops 3,000 in Israel-Hezbollah fighting
Ukraine strikes on Moscow shift war momentum

eastern_europe.description: Russian strikes targeted Dnipro with at least a dozen injured reported.
Russian strikes hit Odesa region as part of overnight attacks on southern Ukraine.
Ukraine launched hundreds of drone strikes on Russian territory including electronics factory and oil pumping station.
Ukrainian long-range drones targeted electronics factory and oil pumping station in Moscow region over weekend.

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrike reportedly killed Hamas armed wing chief Ezzedine Al-Haddad.
US Apache and Seahawk helicopters sank half a dozen Iranian small boats while clearing threats.
Israeli army carried out series of strikes in south Lebanon as part of ongoing conflict.
Hezbollah struck military target in northern Israel in response to Israeli strikes.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
Lebanon deaths from US-Israel Iran operation
Gulf states deaths from Iran conflict

russia.text: A return of third-country military infrastructure to Afghanistan or the deployment of new military facilities in neighboring states would be unacceptable.
russia.speaker: Sergei Shoigu
russia.title: Russian Security Council Secretary

middle_east.text: For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving Fast, or there won't be anything left of them. Time Is Of The Essence!
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: I will do the impossible in order to stop the war with Israel.
middle_east.speaker: Joseph Aoun
middle_east.title: Lebanese President

middle_east.text: Clock is ticking for Iran, adding that Tehran better get moving fast, or there won't be anything left of them.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: I am holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as serious negotiations are now taking place
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Trump conducting state visit to Beijing with US executives from major corporations. China and Russia reportedly watching US-Iran war to assess American military capabilities. Beijing potentially gaining asymmetric advantages from prolonged US involvement in Iran conflict.

Trump administration reportedly urging UAE to seize Iran's strategic Lavan Island to avoid deploying US ground forces. Iran accuses UAE of betrayal during BRICS meeting. UAE positioning itself between US pressure and regional stability concerns.

Leaked diplomatic cable reignites claims of US role in Imran Khan's removal over Pakistan's neutral stance on Russia-Ukraine war. Document suggests US displeasure with Pakistan's non-aligned position during ongoing conflicts.

Belarus announced snap nuclear exercises with Russian allies following Ukraine's warnings about deeper involvement in Kremlin's war. Minsk conducting joint military drills with Russia amid escalating tensions with Kyiv.

financial.notes: Trump suggests Fed rate cuts may be delayed until Iran conflict resolution.

update_log.text: Belarus dismisses concerns over joint nuclear drills with Russia
Trump confirms calling off planned Iran attack at Gulf states' request
Lebanon health ministry reports death toll exceeds 3,000 in latest fighting
Iran reportedly reactivating missile bunkers amid rising tensions
Trump discusses resuming combat operations against Iran with security team amid rising tensions.
Belarus announces snap nuclear exercises with Russia following Ukraine warnings about deeper involvement.
Iran reactivates missile bunkers as regional tensions escalate across Middle East.
Lebanese President Aoun vows to do 'impossible' to stop war with Israel as death toll nears 3,000.
Ukraine launches new long-range drone strikes targeting Moscow region electronics factory and oil facilities.
Trump issues ultimatum to Iran warning there 'won't be anything left' without quick peace deal on day 80 of conflict.
Iran reactivates missile bunkers amid rising regional tensions as US-Israeli campaign continues.
Ukraine launches biggest drone attack on Moscow using two fixed-wing variants and unknown third type.
Russian overnight strikes hit Ukraine's Dnipro and Odesa regions injuring at least dozen civilians.
